hero.title: About TechStore
hero.subtitle:
TechStore is an online store for computer equipment. One of the largest in Uzbekistan, we offer customers the latest, high-quality computer hardware. Our selection includes laptops, monitors, graphics cards, processors and many other devices at affordable prices.

Why choose us? The TechStore team treats every customer personally. We sell only officially guaranteed products and guarantee delivery across Tashkent within 24 hours. We also offer convenient payment options and installment plans.

story.title: Our Story
story.text: Founded in Tashkent, TechStore began as a small enthusiast shop and has grown into a leading provider of premium computer hardware and IT accessories across Uzbekistan.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To empower our customers with cutting-edge technology that enhances productivity, creativity, and play. We aim to be Uzbekistan's most trusted hardware provider.

warranty.title: Warranty & Support
warranty.desc: Official warranties and reliable after-sales service.

advice.title: Expert Advice
advice.desc: Experienced staff to help you choose the right components.

delivery.title: Fast Delivery
delivery.desc: Fast and reliable delivery across Tashkent.

location.title: Our Location
location.text: Visit our showroom in the Tech Park district of Tashkent to see products in person, get expert recommendations, and pick up your orders.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: TechStore ("We", "Our", "Company") values your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and how we protect it on our website (techstore.uz).
privacy.footerNote: This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time. We will notify you about significant changes by email. By continuing to use the site you accept the updated policy.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.content: TechStore ("We") values the privacy of our users. This policy explains what information we collect and how we use it.

sections.title: What Information We Collect
sections.content:
We may collect:

1. Account Information: Name, email, phone number, encrypted password.

2. Purchase Information: Your browsing and order history, payment methods.

3. Automatic Information: IP address, browser type, operating system, cookies.

4. Contact Information: Information included in messages you send us.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.content:
We use the following types of cookies:

• Essential Cookies: Required for site operation (authentication, security).

• Analytics Cookies: Improve user experience via Google Analytics.

• Marketing Cookies: For ad campaigns such as Facebook Pixel and Google Ads.

You can disable cookies but some site features may not work properly.

sections.title: How We Use Information
sections.content:
We use information to:

• Create and manage accounts
• Process orders
• Process payments
• Protect against fraud and secure the site
• Improve and analyze the site
• Send notifications and messages
• Respond to customer support requests

sections.title: Security
sections.content:
We protect your data using measures such as:

• HTTPS encryption for all connections
• HttpOnly cookies to limit JavaScript access
• Secure cookie flags (HTTPS only)
• JWT tokens for secure authentication

No system is 100% secure. Please contact us if you notice a security issue.

sections.title: Data Retention
sections.content:
We retain data as follows:

• Account Information: while your account is active + 1 year
• Purchase Records: up to 7 years as required by law
• Analytics Data: up to 26 months
• Cookies: most expire within 365 days or at session end

You may request deletion or update of your data at any time.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.content:
You have the following rights:

• Access and download your data
• Rectify inaccurate data
• Delete your data
• Object to processing
• Unsubscribe from marketing communications

To exercise these rights contact support@techstore.uz.

sections.title: Third Parties
sections.content:
We use third-party providers for some services, which may include:

• Google Analytics (analytics)
• Facebook Pixel (marketing)
• Google Ads (advertising)
• Payment providers (payment processing)
• Email providers (sending messages)

Third parties have their own privacy policies and terms.

sections.title: Contact Us
sections.content:
If you have privacy questions, contact us:

Email: support@techstore.uz
Phone: +998 90 123 45 67
Website: https://www.techstore.uz
Address: Mirabad district, Tashkent

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our products, services, and policies.

items.question: How long does delivery take?
items.answer: Standard delivery takes 2-3 business days within Tashkent. Express delivery is available for next-day service. Orders can also be picked up from our showroom.

items.question: What is your warranty policy?
items.answer: All products come with manufacturer warranty ranging from 1-5 years depending on the product. We also provide after-sales support and can assist with warranty claims.

items.question: Can I return or exchange a product?
items.answer: Yes, we accept returns within 14 days of purchase if the product is unused and in original packaging. Exchanges can be made within 30 days. Please contact us for the return/exchange process.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept cash on delivery, credit/debit cards, and online payment methods. Payment can be made at the time of delivery or in our showroom.

items.question: How can I track my order?
items.answer: After placing an order, you can track it from your profile page. You will also receive email notifications about your order status updates.

items.question: Do you build custom PCs?
items.answer: Yes! We offer custom PC building services. Choose your components and our experts will assemble and test your system before delivery.

items.question: Are all products genuine?
items.answer: Absolutely! We only sell 100% authentic products from authorized distributors and manufacturers. All products come with proper documentation and warranty.

items.question: Do you offer installation services?
items.answer: Yes, we provide installation and setup services for certain products. Contact us for more details about available services and pricing.

items.question: How do I create an account?
items.answer: Click on 'Sign Up' in the top right corner, fill in your details, and verify your email. An account helps you track orders, save wishlists, and get faster checkout.

items.question: What if I receive a damaged product?
items.answer: If you receive a damaged product, please contact us immediately with photos. We will arrange for a replacement or full refund at no additional cost to you.
